# GitHub Issue Templates Guide

This folder contains GitHub Issue Forms used to create consistent, execution-ready issues.

## Templates

- `1-feature.yml`: Generic feature template.
- `2-bug.yml`: Bug report template.
- `3-refactor.yml`: Refactor template.
- `4-frontend-feature.yml`: Frontend feature template optimized for fast issue creation.

## Frontend template purpose

`4-frontend-feature.yml` is designed for frontend work and enforces the minimum information needed to start implementation with low ambiguity.

Use it for:

- New pages and routes
- Navigation changes
- UI components
- Frontend validations
- UX states (loading/empty/error)

## Metadata defaults

- Title: `[Feat][Frontend]: `
- Labels: `inbox`, `frontend`
- Project: `UdL-EPS-SoftArch-Igualada/4`

## Required fields

- Feature description
- Goal / user value
- Postconditions
- Scope checklist (in-scope and out-of-scope)
- Acceptance criteria
- Mini demo / manual validation
- Story points

## Optional fields

- Preconditions
- UI routes/components affected
- Files to create/modify
- Testing notes
- Dependencies / blockers

## Story points options

- `0.25`, `0.5`, `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `8`

## Fast workflow

1. Open **Issues** > **New issue**.
2. Choose **Frontend feature (fast standard)**.
3. Complete all required fields.
4. Add optional technical context if useful.
5. Submit and assign through your normal process.
